title: e-Shram Card Registration
meta_description: e-Shram card registration for unorganized workers. Get ₹2 lakh accident insurance and access to government welfare schemes.

hero.one_liner: Digital identity card for unorganized workers with free ₹2 lakh accident insurance and access to all welfare schemes

what_is_it: e-Shram is a national database of unorganized workers launched on 26 August 2021 by the Ministry of Labour. It provides a Universal Account Number (UAN) and an e-Shram card to workers in the unorganized sector — construction workers, street vendors, domestic helpers, agricultural laborers, gig workers, etc.

Registered workers automatically get free accidental insurance of ₹2 lakh (₹2 lakh for death/total disability, ₹1 lakh for partial disability) under PMSBY. The e-Shram database also helps the government identify and deliver welfare scheme benefits directly to unorganized workers. Over 30 crore workers have registered.

eligibility.label: Who can register
eligibility.value: Any unorganized sector worker — construction, domestic, street vendor, auto/taxi driver, agricultural laborer, gig worker, etc.

eligibility.label: Income
eligibility.value: Monthly income should be ₹15,000 or less

eligibility.label: Exclusion
eligibility.value: Should not be member of EPFO or ESIC (organized sector)

eligibility.label: Documents
eligibility.value: Aadhaar card, bank account, mobile number linked to Aadhaar

how_to_apply.title: Visit eshram.gov.in or nearest CSC
how_to_apply.description: You can self-register online at eshram.gov.in using mobile OTP, or visit any CSC center for assisted registration.

how_to_apply.title: Enter Aadhaar and verify
how_to_apply.description: Enter Aadhaar number, verify with OTP sent to Aadhaar-linked mobile number.

how_to_apply.title: Fill worker details
how_to_apply.description: Enter your occupation type, skill, monthly income, family details, and bank account number.

how_to_apply.title: Download e-Shram card
how_to_apply.description: After registration, download your e-Shram card with UAN. This is your digital identity as an unorganized worker.

important_alert.text: e-Shram registration is completely free. Do NOT pay anyone to register you. Beware of fake websites and agents charging money. Use only eshram.gov.in or visit a CSC center.

faqs.question: What benefits do I get with e-Shram card?
faqs.answer: Free ₹2 lakh accident insurance, eligibility tracking for PM schemes (PM-SYM pension, PMJJBY, PMSBY, BOCW, etc.), and future social security benefits as the government links more schemes to the e-Shram database.

faqs.question: Is there any payment or pension with e-Shram?
faqs.answer: e-Shram itself does not give direct cash payments or pension. It's a registration/identity system. However, some states have linked additional benefits like ₹500-2,000 to e-Shram registrations. Check your state government's announcements.

faqs.question: I'm a gig worker (Swiggy/Ola/Uber). Can I register?
faqs.answer: Yes. Gig workers and platform workers are specifically included in the unorganized worker definition under e-Shram.

faqs.question: Can I register if I'm already in PM Kisan?
faqs.answer: Yes. e-Shram is a worker database, not mutually exclusive with PM Kisan. You can be registered in both.
